calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Class Action Complaint Without Prejudice Pursuant To Crc 3.770; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS DAN BECK AND BIENVENIDA SALAZAR's Motion For Dismissal Of Class Action Complaint Without Prejudice Pursuant To CRC 3.770.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion for dismissal of class action complaint without prejudice pursuant to CRC 3.770" is granted.

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
